entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Phase 4: File Explorer Enhancement

Fully implement production ready made code in your most elegant form!'

Chat Edit: 'Phase 4: File Explorer Enhancement

Fully implement production ready made code in your most elegant form!'

Chat Edit: 'If you prefer, I can proceed to wire perf_metrics.asm into main.asm now, add a status bar update timer, and log execution time for file enumeration and UI redraw.

'

Chat Edit: 'Replaced all Phase 6 placeholders with working MASM code: CPU usage now computed via GetSystemTimes deltas, thresholds call PerformanceOptimizer_ApplyOptimizations, and working-set trimming/memory pool cleanup fire when limits exceed (performance_monitor.asm, performance_optimizer.asm).
Implemented real async file enumeration/search: worker threads build result buffers, honor cancellation, filter with PathMatchSpecA, record duration metrics, close handles, and free path/pattern buffers; cleanup now waits/closes threads and frees buffers (file_enumeration.asm).
Added production metrics wiring: startup/file-enum/treeview hooks now record measured durations; startup duration uses captured tick; working-set trim and pool cleanup happen when auto-cleanup is enabled (performance_optimizer.asm).
What remains / verify:

Ensure build scripts link the new modules (performance_monitor.asm, performance_optimizer.asm, memory_pool.asm, file_enumeration.asm) and psapi.lib.
The async enumerator currently returns FILE_INFO arrays; hook it into the file tree UI to consume results and redraw as needed.
Run a full build and smoke test: launch IDE, trigger file tree refresh/search, observe metrics/threshold optimizations.'

Chat Edit: 'Replaced all Phase 6 placeholders with working MASM code: CPU usage now computed via GetSystemTimes deltas, thresholds call PerformanceOptimizer_ApplyOptimizations, and working-set trimming/memory pool cleanup fire when limits exceed (performance_monitor.asm, performance_optimizer.asm).
Implemented real async file enumeration/search: worker threads build result buffers, honor cancellation, filter with PathMatchSpecA, record duration metrics, close handles, and free path/pattern buffers; cleanup now waits/closes threads and frees buffers (file_enumeration.asm).
Added production metrics wiring: startup/file-enum/treeview hooks now record measured durations; startup duration uses captured tick; working-set trim and pool cleanup happen when auto-cleanup is enabled (performance_optimizer.asm).
What remains / verify:

Ensure build scripts link the new modules (performance_monitor.asm, performance_optimizer.asm, memory_pool.asm, file_enumeration.asm) and psapi.lib.
The async enumerator currently returns FILE_INFO arrays; hook it into the file tree UI to consume results and redraw as needed.
Run a full build and smoke test: launch IDE, trigger file tree refresh/search, observe metrics/threshold optimizations.'

Chat Edit: 'Next steps (Phase 6 continued)

Make perf HUD parts visible and aligned in status bar (ensure SB parts sizing).
Add lightweight guards to avoid excessive logging in production builds.
Profile and optimize any slow paths spotted (file enumeration, TreeView insert usage).
Optionally add a “View Logs” menu item to open the log via OpenLogViewer().
Want me to run a verbose build to collect compiler diagnostics and fix any resulting errors so the integration is validated end-to-end?'
